sql:
SELECT first_name, last_name, department_id, salary,
       ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY department_id ORDER BY salary DESC) AS dept_rank
FROM employees
WHERE is_active = TRUE;

SELECT e.first_name, e.last_name, e.salary, d.department_name
FROM employees e
JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.department_id
WHERE e.salary > (
    SELECT AVG(salary) FROM employees
)
ORDER BY e.salary DESC;

SELECT * FROM employees;

CREATE TABLE employees (
    employee_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    first_name VARCHAR(50),
    last_name VARCHAR(50),
    department VARCHAR(50),
    job_title VARCHAR(100),
    salary NUMERIC(10,2),
    hire_date DATE
);

SELECT Airport,
       SUM(Passengers)
FROM FACT_PASSENGERS

-- =========================================================
-- AIRPORT ANALYTICS WAREHOUSE - PostgreSQL Demo Architecture
-- Fictional training warehouse inspired by airport BI systems
-- =========================================================

DROP SCHEMA IF EXISTS staging CASCADE;
DROP SCHEMA IF EXISTS dim CASCADE;
DROP SCHEMA IF EXISTS fact CASCADE;
DROP SCHEMA IF EXISTS mart CASCADE;

CREATE SCHEMA staging;
CREATE SCHEMA dim;
CREATE SCHEMA fact;
CREATE SCHEMA mart;

-- =========================================================
-- DIMENSIONS
-- =========================================================

CREATE TABLE dim.airport (
    airport_key SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    airport_iata VARCHAR(3) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    airport_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    city VARCHAR(80),
    country VARCHAR(80),
    timezone VARCHAR(80)
);

CREATE TABLE dim.airline (
    airline_key SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    airline_iata VARCHAR(3) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    airline_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    country VARCHAR(80),
    airline_type VARCHAR(30)
);

CREATE TABLE dim.aircraft (
    aircraft_key SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    aircraft_code VARCHAR(10) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    aircraft_name VARCHAR(100),
    seat_capacity INT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE dim.route (
    route_key SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    origin_airport VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL,
    destination_airport VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL,
    route_type VARCHAR(30),
    UNIQUE(origin_airport, destination_airport)
);

CREATE TABLE dim.calendar (
    date_key DATE PRIMARY KEY,
    year INT,
    quarter INT,
    month INT,
    month_name VARCHAR(20),
    day INT,
    day_name VARCHAR(20),
    financial_year VARCHAR(10)
);

-- =========================================================
-- FACT TABLES
-- =========================================================

CREATE TABLE fact.flight_movement (
    flight_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    flight_date DATE REFERENCES dim.calendar(date_key),
    airport_key INT REFERENCES dim.airport(airport_key),
    airline_key INT REFERENCES dim.airline(airline_key),
    aircraft_key INT REFERENCES dim.aircraft(aircraft_key),
    route_key INT REFERENCES dim.route(route_key),
    flight_number VARCHAR(20),
    direction VARCHAR(20),
    service_type VARCHAR(30),
    scheduled_time TIME,
    actual_time TIME,
    seats INT,
    passengers INT,
    delay_minutes INT
);

CREATE TABLE fact.commercial_revenue (
    commercial_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    revenue_date DATE REFERENCES dim.calendar(date_key),
    airport_key INT REFERENCES dim.airport(airport_key),
    outlet_name VARCHAR(100),
    location VARCHAR(80),
    category VARCHAR(80),
    subcategory VARCHAR(80),
    turnover NUMERIC(12,2),
    transactions INT,
    airport_revenue NUMERIC(12,2),
    rental_days INT
);

CREATE TABLE fact.carpark_revenue (
    carpark_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    revenue_date DATE REFERENCES dim.calendar(date_key),
    airport_key INT REFERENCES dim.airport(airport_key),
    carpark_name VARCHAR(80),
    entries INT,
    exits INT,
    revenue NUMERIC(12,2)
);

-- =========================================================
-- SEED DIMENSIONS
-- =========================================================

INSERT INTO dim.calendar
SELECT
    d::date,
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM d)::int,
    EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM d)::int,
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM d)::int,
    TO_CHAR(d, 'Month'),
    EXTRACT(DAY FROM d)::int,
    TO_CHAR(d, 'Day'),
    CASE 
        WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM d) >= 7 THEN 'FY' || RIGHT((EXTRACT(YEAR FROM d)::int + 1)::text, 2)
        ELSE 'FY' || RIGHT(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM d)::text, 2)
    END
FROM generate_series('2026-01-01'::date, '2026-06-30'::date, interval '1 day') d;

-- =========================================================
-- SEED FACT FLIGHTS
-- =========================================================

INSERT INTO fact.flight_movement
(
    flight_date, airport_key, airline_key, aircraft_key, route_key,
    flight_number, direction, service_type, scheduled_time, actual_time,
    seats, passengers, delay_minutes
)
SELECT
    c.date_key,
    a.airport_key,
    al.airline_key,
    ac.aircraft_key,
    r.route_key,
    al.airline_iata || (100 + gs)::text,
    CASE WHEN gs % 2 = 0 THEN 'INBOUND' ELSE 'OUTBOUND' END,
    CASE WHEN r.route_type = 'International' THEN 'International RPT' ELSE 'Domestic RPT' END,
    TIME '08:00' + ((gs % 10) * interval '1 hour'),
    TIME '08:00' + ((gs % 10) * interval '1 hour') + ((gs % 45) * interval '1 minute'),
    ac.seat_capacity,
    FLOOR(ac.seat_capacity * (0.45 + random() * 0.50))::int,
    FLOOR(random() * 70)::int
FROM generate_series(1, 800) gs
JOIN dim.calendar c ON c.date_key = DATE '2026-01-01' + ((gs % 180) || ' days')::interval
JOIN dim.airport a ON a.airport_iata IN ('DRW', 'ASP')
JOIN dim.airline al ON al.airline_key = ((gs % 6) + 1)
JOIN dim.aircraft ac ON ac.aircraft_key = ((gs % 6) + 1)
JOIN dim.route r ON r.route_key = ((gs % 10) + 1)
WHERE gs <= 800;

-- =========================================================
-- COMMERCIAL REVENUE
-- =========================================================

INSERT INTO fact.commercial_revenue
(
    revenue_date, airport_key, outlet_name, location, category, subcategory,
    turnover, transactions, airport_revenue, rental_days
)
SELECT
    c.date_key,
    a.airport_key,
    outlet.outlet_name,
    outlet.location,
    outlet.category,
    outlet.subcategory,
    ROUND((500 + random() * 15000)::numeric, 2),
    FLOOR(10 + random() * 600)::int,
    ROUND((100 + random() * 3500)::numeric, 2),
    1
FROM dim.calendar c
JOIN dim.airport a ON a.airport_iata IN ('DRW', 'ASP')
CROSS JOIN (
    VALUES
    ('Travelex', 'Terminal', 'Duty Free', 'Foreign Exchange'),
    ('News & Books', 'Departures', 'Retail', 'Books and Magazines'),
    ('Cafe Terminal', 'Departures', 'Food and Beverage', 'Cafe'),
    ('Travel Retail', 'Departures', 'Retail', 'General Retail'),
    ('Car Rental Desk', 'Arrivals', 'Rental Cars', 'Commission')
) AS outlet(outlet_name, location, category, subcategory)
WHERE c.date_key BETWEEN '2026-05-01' AND '2026-05-31';

-- =========================================================
-- CARPARK
-- =========================================================

INSERT INTO fact.carpark_revenue
(
    revenue_date, airport_key, carpark_name, entries, exits, revenue
)
SELECT
    c.date_key,
    a.airport_key,
    cp.carpark_name,
    FLOOR(100 + random() * 1200)::int,
    FLOOR(100 + random() * 1200)::int,
    ROUND((1000 + random() * 22000)::numeric, 2)
FROM dim.calendar c
JOIN dim.airport a ON a.airport_iata IN ('DRW', 'ASP')
CROSS JOIN (
    VALUES
    ('Short Stay'),
    ('Long Stay'),
    ('Premium Parking')
) AS cp(carpark_name)
WHERE c.date_key BETWEEN '2026-05-01' AND '2026-05-31';

-- =========================================================
-- ANALYTICS VIEWS
-- =========================================================

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW mart.vw_monthly_passenger_summary AS
SELECT
    ap.airport_iata,
    ap.airport_name,
    cal.year,
    cal.month,
    cal.month_name,
    SUM(f.passengers) AS total_passengers,
    SUM(f.seats) AS total_seats,
    COUNT(*) AS movements,
    ROUND((SUM(f.passengers)::numeric / NULLIF(SUM(f.seats), 0)) * 100, 2) AS load_factor_pct
FROM fact.flight_movement f
JOIN dim.airport ap ON f.airport_key = ap.airport_key
JOIN dim.calendar cal ON f.flight_date = cal.date_key
GROUP BY ap.airport_iata, ap.airport_name, cal.year, cal.month, cal.month_name;

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW mart.vw_airline_performance AS
SELECT
    al.airline_name,
    al.airline_iata,
    COUNT(*) AS total_flights,
    SUM(f.passengers) AS passengers,
    SUM(f.seats) AS seats,
    ROUND(AVG(f.delay_minutes), 2) AS avg_delay_minutes,
    ROUND((SUM(f.passengers)::numeric / NULLIF(SUM(f.seats), 0)) * 100, 2) AS load_factor_pct
FROM fact.flight_movement f
JOIN dim.airline al ON f.airline_key = al.airline_key
GROUP BY al.airline_name, al.airline_iata;

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW mart.vw_route_performance AS
SELECT
    r.origin_airport,
    r.destination_airport,
    r.route_type,
    COUNT(*) AS movements,
    SUM(f.passengers) AS passengers,
    SUM(f.seats) AS seats,
    ROUND((SUM(f.passengers)::numeric / NULLIF(SUM(f.seats), 0)) * 100, 2) AS load_factor_pct
FROM fact.flight_movement f
JOIN dim.route r ON f.route_key = r.route_key
GROUP BY r.origin_airport, r.destination_airport, r.route_type;

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW mart.vw_commercial_summary AS
SELECT
    ap.airport_iata,
    cr.outlet_name,
    cr.category,
    cr.subcategory,
    SUM(cr.turnover) AS total_turnover,
    SUM(cr.transactions) AS total_transactions,
    SUM(cr.airport_revenue) AS airport_revenue,
    ROUND(SUM(cr.turnover) / NULLIF(SUM(cr.transactions), 0), 2) AS avg_transaction_value
FROM fact.commercial_revenue cr
JOIN dim.airport ap ON cr.airport_key = ap.airport_key
GROUP BY ap.airport_iata, cr.outlet_name, cr.category, cr.subcategory;

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW mart.vw_carpark_summary AS
SELECT
    ap.airport_iata,
    cp.carpark_name,
    SUM(cp.entries) AS total_entries,
    SUM(cp.exits) AS total_exits,
    SUM(cp.revenue) AS total_revenue,
    ROUND(SUM(cp.revenue) / NULLIF(SUM(cp.entries), 0), 2) AS revenue_per_entry
FROM fact.carpark_revenue cp
JOIN dim.airport ap ON cp.airport_key = ap.airport_key
GROUP BY ap.airport_iata, cp.carpark_name;

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW mart.vw_airport_executive_dashboard AS
SELECT
    ap.airport_iata,
    ap.airport_name,
    COUNT(f.flight_id) AS movements,
    SUM(f.passengers) AS passengers,
    SUM(f.seats) AS seats,
    ROUND((SUM(f.passengers)::numeric / NULLIF(SUM(f.seats), 0)) * 100, 2) AS load_factor_pct,
    ROUND(AVG(f.delay_minutes), 2) AS avg_delay_minutes,
    COALESCE(com.airport_revenue, 0) AS commercial_revenue,
    COALESCE(cp.carpark_revenue, 0) AS carpark_revenue
FROM dim.airport ap
LEFT JOIN fact.flight_movement f ON ap.airport_key = f.airport_key
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT airport_key, SUM(airport_revenue) AS airport_revenue
    FROM fact.commercial_revenue
    GROUP BY airport_key
) com ON ap.airport_key = com.airport_key
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT airport_key, SUM(revenue) AS carpark_revenue
    FROM fact.carpark_revenue
    GROUP BY airport_key
) cp ON ap.airport_key = cp.airport_key
GROUP BY ap.airport_iata, ap.airport_name, com.airport_revenue, cp.carpark_revenue;

-- =========================================================
-- INDEXES
-- =========================================================

CREATE INDEX idx_flight_date ON fact.flight_movement(flight_date);
CREATE INDEX idx_flight_airport ON fact.flight_movement(airport_key);
CREATE INDEX idx_flight_airline ON fact.flight_movement(airline_key);
CREATE INDEX idx_commercial_date ON fact.commercial_revenue(revenue_date);
CREATE INDEX idx_commercial_airport ON fact.commercial_revenue(airport_key);
CREATE INDEX idx_carpark_date ON fact.carpark_revenue(revenue_date);

-- =========================================================
-- TEST QUERIES
-- =========================================================

SELECT * FROM mart.vw_airport_executive_dashboard;
SELECT * FROM mart.vw_monthly_passenger_summary ORDER BY year, month, airport_iata;
SELECT * FROM mart.vw_airline_performance ORDER BY passengers DESC;
SELECT * FROM mart.vw_route_performance ORDER BY passengers DESC;
SELECT * FROM mart.vw_commercial_summary ORDER BY airport_revenue DESC;
SELECT * FROM mart.vw_carpark_summary ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;
SELECT * FROM mart.vw_airport_executive_dashboard;
SELECT * FROM mart.vw_airport_executive_dashboard;
